title: ED pediatric fever documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines Dubai telehealth pediatric fever scope and emergency exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Fever in Children
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for pediatric fever telehealth documentation; partial for a mixed-age fever/URTI workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Prioritises airway, breathing, circulation, consciousness, age-specific risk, and illness-severity assessment.
